import { useStore } from './store'; import { shallow } from 'zustand/shallow'; import { ChartBarIcon, CubeIcon, ShareIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const selector = (state) => ({ nodes: state.nodes, edges: state.edges, }); export const FlowStats = () => { const { nodes, edges } = useStore(selector, shallow); return (
Nodes {nodes.length}
Edges {edges.length}
Status Live
); };
